text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Crown. ♪ I cannot wait for your
party!

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text: Do ze, do ze! I'm really looking forward to it, Dia. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But it means this year's "big sister time" is already
coming to an end...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, I never told you about "big sister time", did I?

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
No, but I'm guessing it's the time between your
birthday and mine... right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
You always take extra good care of me during
that time of year. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, every year around then, you invite me to
all sorts of things. It's really cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's only because you're so helpful to me,
like a big sister! I wanted to repay you...

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no need to pout! I'm already excited for it
again next year, so be my big sister again then,
okay?
